description_long: This house features a broad, low-pitched hip roof with multiple intersecting sections, giving it a substantial and balanced appearance. The exterior walls are clad in a combination of brick and siding, with large windows distributed symmetrically across the front and sides. A prominent covered porch with steps and supporting columns marks the main entryway, providing a welcoming transition from the striped yard. The house sits on a rectangular lot with a striped ground pattern, suggesting a manicured lawn or decorative paving. The structure appears to have two full stories, with the upper level slightly recessed under the wide eaves of the roof. Architectural details such as the overhanging eaves, brickwork, and columned porch evoke a Craftsman or Prairie style influence.
description: A two-story house with a wide hip roof, brick and siding exterior, and a prominent columned porch entryway. Symmetrical windows and a striped yard enhance its Craftsman or Prairie style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, columns, and a covered porch, as well as symmetrical windows and brick detailing.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the hip roof's extension, and the striped yard extending to the sides.
description_view_2: Rear view with a secondary entry or patio area, visible windows, and the continuation of the brick and siding exterior.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the house's width, window placement, and the expansive hip roof overhang.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with steps, prominent columns, and an overhanging roof, emphasizing a welcoming and sheltered entrance.
